VISIONRESTRICTOR.settings.defaultMaxRang: Maximum token vision range in scene distance units. Use 0 to disable globally. A scene can override this value.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.sceneConfig.fieldHint: Caps token vision on this scene in scene distance units. Leave blank to use the world default. Use 0 to disable on this scene.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.notifications.sceneSet: Vision Restrictor: scene maximum vision set to {range}.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.notifications.sceneClea: Vision Restrictor: scene override cleared; using world default.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.notifications.worldOnly: Vision Restrictor settings can only be changed by a GM.
